title: Circular 002/2025: The Misuse of Drugs Act 1971 Order 2024
body: "Changes to the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971 (“the MDA 1971”) to control 22 substances, along with 2-benzyl benzimidazole variants (nitazenes) falling under a new generic definition, under that act.  Further changes to also schedule those substances under the Misuse of Drugs Regulations 2001 (SI 2001/3998) (“the MDR 2001”) and, where appropriate, designate them under the Misuse of Drugs (Designation) (England, Wales and Scotland) Order 2015 (SI 2015/704) (“the 2015 Order”). "
